title: Backend Developer Vacancy at SAP India Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at SAP India Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
SAP India Capital India has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About SAP India Capital India:
SAP India Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SAP India Capital India!
